_publications._publicationTitle: Primary osteopathy of vertebrae in a neurofibromatosis type 1 murine model.

_contextSnippet: Significantly increased osteoclast number per mm of bone surface was observed in the upper facet process of Nf1+/− and Nf1 mice compared with WT mice
details: Significantly increased osteoclast number per mm of bone surface in upper facet process compared to WT
